name: FORD MOTOR CO
summary: Ford Motor Company, incorporated in Delaware in 1919, is a global automaker headquartered in Dearborn, Michigan. Ford develops, manufactures, and sells Ford and Lincoln branded ICE, hybrid, and electric vehicles including trucks, SUVs, commercial vans, and cars. Operations are organized into three segments: Ford Blue (ICE/hybrid), Ford Model e (EVs/software), and Ford Pro (commercial vehicles/services). Ford Motor Credit Company LLC provides financial services. In 2025, Ford sold approximately 4,395,000 vehicles worldwide.

products.name: Ford ICE and Hybrid Vehicles
products.description: Internal combustion engine and hybrid Ford and Lincoln vehicles sold to retail customers globally.

products.name: Electric Vehicles (EVs/EREVs)
products.description: Battery electric and extended range electric vehicles developed and sold under Ford Model e segment.

products.name: BlueCruise
products.description: Advanced driver assistance system (ADAS) offered as a connected service across Ford vehicles.

products.name: Super Duty
products.description: Core Ford Pro commercial truck sold in North America.

products.name: Transit
products.description: Range of commercial vans sold under Ford Pro in North America and Europe.

products.name: Ford Blue Vehicles
products.description: ICE and hybrid Ford and Lincoln vehicles for retail customers, including service parts and accessories.

products.name: Ford Model e EVs
products.description: Battery electric vehicles and extended range electric vehicles (EREVs) for retail customers in North America, Europe, and China.

products.name: Ford Pro Commercial Vehicles
products.description: Ford and Lincoln vehicles including Super Duty, Transit vans, and Ranger for commercial, government, and rental customers.

products.name: BlueCruise
products.description: Advanced Driver Assistance System (ADAS) offered as a connected digital service.

products.name: Ford Pro Telematics
products.description: Fleet telematics and EV charging solutions for commercial fleet customers.

products.name: Ford Motor Credit
products.description: Financial services including vehicle financing provided through Ford Motor Credit Company LLC.

products.name: Extended Service Contracts
products.description: Extended service contracts offered to vehicle customers.

products.name: Connected Vehicle Software
products.description: Embedded software and connected vehicle technologies providing always-on digital experiences for customers.

partnerships.description: Ford sells EVs including EREVs through unconsolidated affiliates in China, reported under Ford Blue segment.
